text:
Created attachment 256825
[PATCH] emulators/edumips64: update 1.2.10 → 1.3.0

2023-10-17: Release 1.3.0 (codename: Lourdes)

EduMIPS64 1.3.0 is out! This is a release introducing a backwards-incompatible change to `DMULU`, Simplified Chinese translation, a more modern look and feel and minor bug-fixes.
